ariaGame.name: Game region label
ariaGame.description: Screen-reader label for the whole play area.

ariaUp.name: Up control label
ariaUp.description: Accessible label for the move-up control.

ariaDown.name: Down control label
ariaDown.description: Accessible label for the move-down control.

ariaLeft.name: Left control label
ariaLeft.description: Accessible label for the move-left control.

ariaRight.name: Right control label
ariaRight.description: Accessible label for the move-right control.

start.name: Play button
start.description: Label on the button that starts a round.

score.name: Score label
score.description: Label preceding the live score in the HUD.

goal.name: Goal label
goal.description: Label preceding the goal score needed to pass.

dotsLeft.name: Dots-left label
dotsLeft.description: Label preceding the count of bananas still on the board.

verified.name: Verified badge
verified.description: Short badge shown once the player reaches the goal score and the check is satisfied.

caught.name: Caught message
caught.description: End-screen message when a chaser catches the runner before the goal.

cleared.name: Cleared message
cleared.description: End-screen message when every dot is eaten.

retry.name: Retry button
retry.description: Label on the button that restarts the round.

announceStart.name: Start announcement
announceStart.description: Live-region announcement when the round begins.

announcePower.name: Power-dot announcement
announcePower.description: Live-region announcement when a power coconut is eaten and chasers turn vulnerable.

announceVerified.name: Verified announcement
announceVerified.description: Live-region announcement when the player has eaten enough of the maze's dots to pass.

announceCaught.name: Caught announcement
announceCaught.description: Live-region announcement when a chaser catches the runner.

announceCleared.name: Cleared announcement
announceCleared.description: Live-region announcement when the maze is fully cleared.

objective.name: Objective
objective.description: Start-screen line stating the win objective; {goal} is the number of dots to eat (keep the {goal} placeholder).

en.announceStart: Game started. Grab the bananas and avoid the chasers.
en.announceVerified: Verified. You cleared enough of the maze.
en.announceCaught: A chaser caught you. Try again.
en.objective: Grab {goal} bananas to win. Dodge the chasers!

zh-Hans.announceStart: 游戏开始。吃掉所有香蕉，躲开追逐者。
zh-Hans.announcePower: 能量椰子。追逐者现在可以吃掉。
zh-Hans.announceVerified: 验证通过。你已吃掉足够多的豆子。
zh-Hans.announceCaught: 追逐者抓住了你。再试一次。
zh-Hans.objective: 吃掉 {goal} 根香蕉就赢，小心躲开追逐者！

es.announceStart: Juego iniciado. Come los plátanos y esquiva a los perseguidores.
es.announcePower: Coco de poder. Los perseguidores son vulnerables.
es.announceVerified: Verificado. Comiste suficientes puntos del laberinto.
es.announceCaught: Un perseguidor te atrapó. Inténtalo otra vez.
es.objective: Come {goal} plátanos para ganar. ¡Esquiva a los perseguidores!

ar.announceStart: بدأت اللعبة. التهم الموز وتجنّب المطاردين.
ar.announcePower: جوزة هند خارقة. يمكنك الآن التهام المطاردين.
ar.announceVerified: تم التحقق. التهمت ما يكفي من نقاط المتاهة.
ar.announceCaught: أمسك بك أحد المطاردين. حاول مرة أخرى.

pt.announceStart: Jogo iniciado. Coma as bananas e fuja dos perseguidores.
pt.announcePower: Coco de poder. Os perseguidores estão vulneráveis.
pt.announceVerified: Verificado. Você comeu pontos suficientes do labirinto.
pt.announceCaught: Um perseguidor te pegou. Tente de novo.
pt.objective: Coma {goal} bananas para vencer. Fuja dos perseguidores!

fr.announceStart: Partie lancée. Mangez les bananes et évitez les poursuivants.
fr.announcePower: Noix de coco de pouvoir. Les poursuivants sont vulnérables.
fr.announceVerified: Vérifié. Vous avez mangé assez de points du labyrinthe.
fr.announceCaught: Un poursuivant vous a attrapé. Réessayez.
fr.objective: Mangez {goal} bananes pour gagner. Évitez les poursuivants !

de.announceStart: Spiel gestartet. Sammle die Bananen und weiche den Verfolgern aus.
de.announceVerified: Verifiziert. Du hast genug Punkte im Labyrinth gesammelt.
de.announceCaught: Ein Verfolger hat dich erwischt. Versuch es nochmal.
de.objective: Sammle {goal} Bananen zum Gewinnen. Weiche den Verfolgern aus!

ru.announceStart: Игра началась. Собирайте бананы и уворачивайтесь от преследователей.
ru.announcePower: Силовой кокос. Преследователей теперь можно съесть.
ru.announceVerified: Проверено. Вы собрали достаточно точек в лабиринте.
ru.objective: Соберите {goal} бананов, чтобы победить. Уворачивайтесь от преследователей!

ja.announceStart: ゲーム開始。バナナを集めて追っ手をかわしましょう。
ja.announcePower: パワーココナッツ。追っ手を食べられます。
ja.announceVerified: 認証完了。迷路のドットを十分に食べました。
ja.announceCaught: 追っ手につかまりました。もう一度どうぞ。
ja.announceCleared: 迷路クリア。お見事です。
ja.objective: バナナを {goal} 本食べればクリア。追っ手をかわしましょう！

ko.announceStart: 게임 시작. 바나나를 모으고 추격자를 피하세요.
ko.announcePower: 파워 코코넛. 추격자를 먹을 수 있어요.

id.announceStart: Permainan dimulai. Makan semua pisang dan hindari para pengejar.
id.announcePower: Kelapa kekuatan. Para pengejar bisa dimakan.
id.announceVerified: Terverifikasi. Kamu makan cukup banyak titik di labirin.
id.objective: Makan {goal} pisang untuk menang. Hindari para pengejar!
